使用「新增任务」按钮添加你的第一个微调任务吧: Use the "Add Task" button to add your first fine-tuning task
从左侧选择一个任务以查看详情: Select a task from the left to view details
不能小于 0.01 最小值: Cannot be less than the minimum value of 0.01
微调之后的模型名称，全局唯一，QWEN 为设置模型后缀: Fine-tuned model name, globally unique, QWEN is the set model suffix
使用【新增任务】按钮添加你的第一个采集任务吧: Use the "Add Task" button to add your first collection task
模型元数据、自动化行为元数据，准确的元数据有助于数据集的效果显著提升: Model metadata and automation behavior metadata, accurate metadata can significantly improve the effect of datasets
准确的元数据描述将有助于数据集的效果显著提升: Accurate metadata description will help significantly improve dataset effect
输入字段编码或字段名称搜索: Enter field code or field name to search
输入模板名称 / 模板描述搜索: Enter template name/template description to search
请输入编辑块内容为空时的提示文案: Enter prompt text when the edit block content is empty
查看模型元数据、自动化行为元数据，准确的元数据有助于数据集的效果显著提升: View model metadata and automation behavior metadata, accurate metadata can significantly improve the effect of datasets
具备推理和场景规划功能的智能助手，适用于多场景复杂任务完成的场景: Intelligent assistant with reasoning and scene planning functions, suitable for completing complex tasks in multiple scenarios
具备推理和执行拥有特定工具执行力的智能助手，适用于细粒度对话场景的业务场景: Intelligent assistant with reasoning and execution capabilities of specific tools, suitable for business scenarios of fine-grained dialogue scenarios
请先选择厂商，再选择模型: Please select a vendor first, then select a model
暂无元数据，请点击 \"选择\" 添加: No metadata available, please click "Select" to add
暂无工具，请点击 \"选择\" 添加工具: No tools available, please click "Select" to add tools
暂无协同智能体，请点击 \"选择\" 添加: No collaborative agents available, please click "Select" to add
每次对话开始前，发送一个初始内容。支持标准 Markdown 语法，可使用的额外: Send an initial content before each conversation starts. Support standard Markdown syntax, available extra tag [Shortcut Key]: user can send the question directly after clicking
按下 Cmd + Enter 换行，Option + ↑/↓ 切换历史消息: Press Cmd + Enter to wrap, Option + ↑/↓ to switch historical messages
范围：0~10。值越大，代表模型回答越发散；值越小，代表回答越严谨。: Range: 0~10. The larger the value, the more divergent the model's answers; the smaller the value, the more rigorous the answers.
范围：0~100。可以配置模型支持的记忆轮数，如果模型的超出上下文，系统会自动截: Range: 0~100. You can configure the memory rounds supported by the model. If the model exceeds the context, the system will automatically truncate to ensure that it does not exceed the model context as much as possible. So even if 30 rounds of conversation are configured, it may not reach 30 rounds in actual operation.
范围：0~1。温度采样的替代方法，称为 Nucleus 采样，该模型考虑了具有: Range: 0~1. An alternative to temperature sampling, called Nucleus sampling, the model considers the results of tokens with TOP_P probability mass. 0.1 means only tokens containing the highest probability mass are considered. Default is 1.
多个序列请用\t隔开，例如：aaa\tstop: Separate multiple sequences with	, e.g.: aaa	stop
请先选择左侧的工具集: Please select the toolset on the left first
请输入内容后再尝试发送: Please enter content before attempting to send
未设置任何角色时，所有用户可访问；设置后，仅限绑定下方角色的用户: All users can access when no roles are set; after setting, only users bound to the following roles can access
定义当前智能体发布的渠道: Define the publishing channels of the current agent
未指定时，默认在应用侧不可见。指定后，将取按类型和指定视图的集合发布: Invisible on the application side by default when not specified. After specification, it will be published to the collection of views by type and specified
当前应用所有表格: All tables in the current application
当前应用所有表单: All forms in the current application
当前应用所有详情页: All detail pages in the current application
当前应用所有画廊: All galleries in the current application
除 Aino 对话框外，发布至各类视图中的样例: Samples published to various views except the Aino dialog box
该工具无需输入参数: This tool does not require input parameters
运行后结果将显示在此处: Results will be displayed here after running
执行失败：GraphQL error：校验失败，数据错误: Execution failed: GraphQL error: Validation failed, data error
保存失败：请至少添加一个工具或函数: Save failed: Please add at least one tool or function
使用「新增元数据」添加第一条元数据: Use "Add Metadata" to add the first metadata
从左侧选择一个元数据以查看详情: Select a metadata from the left to view details
在实际页面展示中，会按照配置的查询条件展示数据。: In actual page display, data will be displayed according to the configured query conditions.
自动化行为元数据，准确的元数据有助于数据集的效果显著提升: Automation Behavior Metadata, accurate metadata helps significantly improve dataset effect
